frontend_routes.summary: All 9 business routes implemented with full UI. Commercial-grade design with design tokens, card isolation, 15px margins.

dubbing.status: Complete - Three engine modes, SSE streaming, waveform player, emotion control, batch cancel, text editor with toolbar
dubbing.notes: Full TTS integration, emotion sliders, reference audio, parameter panel

cover.status: Complete - File management for generated audio/video/subtitle outputs

copywriting.status: Complete - Connected to real Bicut ASR via Tauri bridge
copywriting.notes: Translate/optimize backend ready, frontend auto-routed through isTauri check

video.notes: Core UI implemented, some features may be placeholder

project.description: 角色页/多角色配音 (Multi-Role Dubbing)
project.status: Complete - Role management, batch generation, line editing, emotion/strength per line
project.notes: Large 440-line refactor completed, entitlement checks integrated

resource.status: Complete - V2-style list design, local-first loading, pagination, cover images
resource.notes: 42 presets migrated from V2, performance optimized with 900ms timeout, lazy loading

setting.status: Complete - Settings with cloud availability sync, fixed $effect loop bug
setting.notes: Cloud balance derived from membership store, LLM API key encrypted

about.status: Complete - Legal modals (ToS/Privacy/EULA) with scrollable content
about.notes: Full legal text, deep synthesis disclosure, modal overflow fix applied

profile.status: UI complete - Permission badges, upgrade modal integration

home.status: Complete - Banner carousel, quick actions, membership display

frontend_components.summary: Full UI atomic library + business components. Design system with 11+ atomic components, comprehensive dubbing components.

sidebar.status: Complete - 7 main items + 2 bottom items, mobile/tablet responsive, collapse support

titlebar.status: Complete - Window controls, logo, profile menu, membership badge, double-click maximize

audio_player.status: Complete - WaveformView integration, seek, time display

engine_selector.status: Complete - Three engine modes with entitlement gating

emotion_control.status: Complete - Emotion sliders (8 dimensions), random emotion, emotion text

player_bar.status: Complete - WaveformView replacement, generation progress, time labels

text_editor.status: Complete - Text editing area with word count

text_toolbar.status: Complete - Formatting toolbar for dubbing text

left_bottom_bar.status: Complete - Generate/cancel buttons with entitlement checks

ui_atomic_library.status: Complete - 12 atomic components with tests, design token system

backend_services.summary: Python FastAPI server on port 9880. Three TTS engines (lightweight/emotion/cloud), subtitle ASR, vocal separation.

tts_engine_management.status: Complete - Lazy loading, acceleration env vars (FP16/CUDA_KERNEL/DEEPSPEED/ACCEL/TORCH_COMPILE), cloud health HTTP ping

inference_service.status: Complete - Sync/stream synthesis, SSE progress, max_mel_tokens adaptive (v1.5:600, v2.0/cloud:1500)
inference_service.notes: Base64 audio decode for cloud forwarding, segment-level progress with duration/RTF

cloud_engine.status: Complete - Xiānggōng Cloud IndexTTS 2.0 remote instance, SSE protocol reuse, base64 audio

voice_separation.status: Implemented - Vocal separation service with info endpoint

subtitle_transcription.status: Complete - Real Bicut ASR implementation (not mock), audio/video transcription
subtitle_transcription.notes: Also has translate and optimize-timing endpoints

server_api.status: Complete - FastAPI with CORS, SSE streaming, all endpoints implemented

rust_layer.summary: Tauri 2 commands and services. 24 Rust source files. All commands registered in lib.rs.

tts_commands.status: Complete - Full sync/stream synthesis, cancel, engine preload

subtitle_commands.status: Complete - SSE streaming via Tauri events, cancel, path-whitelist security

user_commands.status: Complete - Full auth flow with token persistence, encrypted storage

llm_commands.status: Complete - AES-256-GCM encrypted API key storage

engine_commands.status: Complete - Delegates to TTS service health check

tts_service.status: Complete - HTTP client to Python server, SSE parsing, event forwarding, cancel token

subtitle_service.status: Complete - SSE streaming, cancel, read with path whitelist + size limit

ipc.status: Complete - 20+ Tauri commands registered, event-based SSE streaming, state management

api.status: Complete - HTTP client for backend API

strengths: Complete Tauri 2 + SvelteKit 5 desktop application shell with smart window sizing
Three TTS engine architecture (lightweight/emotion/cloud) fully wired end-to-end
Real Bicut ASR integration (not mock) with Tauri bridge
Comprehensive membership/entitlement system with encrypted storage
Commercial-grade UI with design tokens, 12 atomic components, responsive layout
SSE streaming pipeline from Python→Rust→Frontend for real-time progress
Security: path whitelist for subtitle output, AES-256-GCM for API keys, CSP configured
42 preset voice samples migrated from V2 with metadata
Performance optimized: local-first loading, 900ms fetch timeouts, pagination
remaining_work: Member character quota + account center UI (medium priority)
Frontend translate/optimize call layer integration (backend ready)
Health check implementations for audio/file/sample commands (3 TODOs)

Cloud engine requires XIANGONG_TTS_BASE env var to be useful
